name: landing-page-design-plugin
description: High-concept landing page workflow for Codex with repo AGENTS.md seeding and mandatory design.md planning before implementation.

interface.shortDescription: Write design.md first, then build one or more high-concept landing pages.
interface.longDescription: Ensures repo-level AGENTS.md guidance exists, resolves all landing page inputs first, writes a concrete design.md with one section per variant, then implements each page from that plan.
defaultPrompt: Create three distinct landing page variants.
Write design.md first, then build the page.
